column1: Jackson Chourio leads the slate with a strong hit probability and a recent surge at the plate, making him a reliable option in a hitter-friendly park. Jeremy Pena offers similar consistency atop Houston’s lineup, with the highest rate of games with a hit among the group. Spencer Steer and Luis Arraez both benefit from platoon advantages but trail slightly in recent form. Chourio stands out for Beat The Streak players seeking a steady, high-upside pick.
